# alternateName

**Instance Property**

The name to use if the contact has no display name.

## Declaration

```swift
var alternateName: String? { get set }
```

## Displaying Contact Properties

- **contact**: The contact being displayed.
- **message**: The message displayed under the name of the contact.
- **displayedPropertyKeys**: The contact property keys to display.

items.description: The message displayed under the name of the contact.
items.name: message

items.description: The contact property keys to display.
items.name: displayedPropertyKeys
